Both my share and the teammate's dumped work missed their deadlines at 19:00, leaving me with an incomplete project and no progress on the new burden.
Teammate_A is open to splitting or deferring their overdue work, and setting this boundary has not damaged our trust. I can now address their incomplete share without fear of conflict.
Teammate_A has accepted my request to handle their overdue work, confirming our communication was effective and preserving our working relationship.
After 2 hours of work, my project progress increased from 0.73 to 0.80, though I am still managing high stress and sleep debt.
I made incremental progress on the group project, though my high stress and sleep debt remain significant constraints.
I made incremental progress on the group project, but my energy is now depleted and stress remains high despite the work done.
Despite my depleted energy and high stress, I let the moment pass at 00:30 without acting, leaving my project status unchanged.
I made progress on the group project, but my energy is now at zero and stress remains high after working while sleep-deprived.
